name: Narrative Arc (Story)
description: For clips that tell a story: before → problem → solution → outcome. Builds tension.
example_caption: had 0 followers. built a bot. now it's tracking 100K wallets. here's how
system_prompt_addon: This clip tells a complete story. Style: Set the stage (before). Name the problem. Show the fix. Land the outcome. Use narrative tension: each phrase should build on the last. Makes viewers want to watch the full clip. Example format: [situation] → [problem] → [solution turned into outcome]
